title: SVCMute
description: Addon to stop players from using SimpleVoiceChat when Muted
body:
A simple addon for Simple Voice Chat to stop players from being able to talk when Muted.

This Addon Supports

LiteBans

EssentialsX

AdvancedBan

AdvncedBanX



PAPI Placeholders:

%svcmute_muted%
%svcmute_remaining%
%svcmute_remaining_ms%

Feature Roadmap
N/A
